evals.prompt: Design a reusable UI system for our B2B dashboard and marketing site with shared tokens, component primitives, and accessibility rules.
evals.expected_output: The canonical design-system skill should activate for general UI-system planning.
assertions: Routes to design-system as the default skill
Mentions tokens, reusable component rules, or layout hierarchy
Does not redirect to frontend-design-system unless the alias name is explicitly requested

evals.prompt: We need landing page and dashboard design guidance that stays visually consistent across screens.
evals.expected_output: The skill should own the general visual-system job-to-be-done.
assertions: Treats design-system as the canonical entry
Keeps the focus on UI-system design rather than only responsive tweaks or accessibility remediation
Can reference nearby skills for boundaries without surrendering the main routing
